backend.bar: Ship fast mindset, problem solving, adaptability
backend.portfolio_bar: Full product delivery, ability to work across stack
backend.interview_format: Technical chat → take-home project → team interview

frontend.portfolio_bar: Complete product shipping, user feedback incorporation
frontend.interview_format: Technical discussion → design task → culture fit

resume_requirements: Shipped product examples, entrepreneurial spirit, concrete impact metrics
hiring_philosophy: Pragmatism over perfection, T-shaped generalists, passionate about problem
compensation_expectations: Lower salary but equity upside, learning opportunities unlimited
career_path: Rapid growth, varied responsibilities, leadership opportunities
unique_aspects: More responsive to candidates, flexible skill requirements, impact immediately
red_flags: Unclear product-market fit, founder conflict, poor communication
